tasks.subject: Task 0: Add SubmoduleLogSink interface
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A vscode-free sink interface usable by SubmoduleService and tests.

**Files:**
- Create: src/services/submoduleLogSink.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Interface exports header, stdout, stderr, done, error
- NULL_SINK constant provided
- No `import * as vscode`

**Verify:** `npm run check-types`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/services/submoduleLogSink.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run check-types", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Interface exports 5 methods", "NULL_SINK provided", "No vscode import"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Implement spawnGitStreaming with TDD
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A line-buffered, cancellable, no-timeout git spawn primitive on SubmoduleService.

**Files:**
- Create: src/test/submoduleStreaming.test.ts
- Modify: src/services/submoduleService.ts (export spawnGitStreaming + private wrapper method)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- No commandTimeoutMs/setTimeout
- stdout/stderr split on \n, trailing partial flushed on close
- \r-only progress redraws collapsed to last segment
- AbortSignal triggers child.kill() and resolves with exitCode null
- Resolves with {exitCode}; never rejects on non-zero exit
- sink.header called by CALLER (not by helper)
- sink.error fires only for child 'error' event

**Verify:** `npm run compile && node --require ./scripts/register-vscode-mock.js --test dist/test/submoduleStreaming.test.js`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/services/submoduleService.ts", "src/services/submoduleLogSink.ts", "src/test/submoduleStreaming.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run compile && node --require ./scripts/register-vscode-mock.js --test dist/test/submoduleStreaming.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No timeout", "Line-buffered", "\\r-only collapsed", "AbortSignal kills child", "Never rejects on non-zero exit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Switch submodule mutating ops to streaming path
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All 8 mutating methods spawn via spawnGitStreaming, accept {sink?, signal?}, return {exitCode: number|null}.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/services/submoduleService.ts (rewrite 8 methods)
- Modify: src/services/gitService.ts ~lines 1895-1920 (pass-throughs + imports)
- Create: src/test/submoduleService.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 8 methods routed through spawnGitStreaming
- Each calls sink.header('$ git ' + args.join(' ')) before spawn
- Signature: (...existingArgs, opts?) => Promise<{exitCode}>
- pullSubmoduleTrackedBranch uses cwd=submodulePath
- Read-only methods unchanged
- GitService wrappers match

**Verify:** `npm run check-types && npm run compile && node --require ./scripts/register-vscode-mock.js --test dist/test/submoduleService.test.js`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/services/submoduleService.ts", "src/services/gitService.ts", "src/test/submoduleService.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run check-types && npm run compile && node --require ./scripts/register-vscode-mock.js --test dist/test/submoduleService.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["8 methods routed", "Header lines", "GitService wrappers match", "Read-only ops unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add Logger.appendRaw and wire SubmoduleProgress adapter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Each vscodeGitClient.submodule.* mutating command runs inside vscode.window.withProgress with Cancel; output streams to channel; bulk auto-shows; warning toast on non-zero exit.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/logger.ts (add appendRaw)
- Modify: src/commands/commandController.ts (add withSubmoduleProgress; rewrite 11 submodule.* registrations)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Logger.appendRaw writes verbatim
- All mutating ops wrapped
- Bulk (initAll/updateAll/updateRecursive/syncAll) auto-show; per-item silent
- Cancel kills child within ~1s
- Non-zero exit + not cancelled → warning toast with Show Output action
- state.refreshSubmodules() in finally always
- Old showInformationMessage toasts removed

**Verify:** `npm run check-types && npm run lint && npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/logger.ts", "src/commands/commandController.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run check-types && npm run lint && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["appendRaw added", "All ops wrapped", "Bulk auto-show", "Cancel works", "Warning toast", "refreshSubmodules in finally"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Manual smoke verification in Extension Development Host
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm user-facing behavior on a real repo with multiple submodules.

**Files:** none (manual verification)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Update All auto-reveals channel; notification with Cancel
- Channel shows header + live progress + [done in Ns, exit 0]
- Per-submodule update doesn't auto-show
- Cancel kills git ~1s; channel shows [cancelled]; tree refreshes
- Broken URL → non-zero exit + warning toast with Show Output
- No 15s timeout error

**Verify:** manual

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Auto-show bulk", "Silent per-item", "Cancel works", "Warning toast", "No 15s timeout"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Update CHANGELOG and README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the user-visible behavior change.

**Files:**
- Modify: CHANGELOG.md ([Unreleased] → Changed)
- Modify: README.md (Manage Submodules section)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- CHANGELOG describes streamed output + Cancel + Output channel + 15s timeout removal
- README mentions Output channel for long-running submodule ops

**Verify:** `git diff CHANGELOG.md README.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CHANGELOG.md", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "git diff CHANGELOG.md README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CHANGELOG entry", "README note"]}
```
